channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 5th March
item.description:
Cluster of Potholes.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 2000mm x 1000mm x 42mm UNMARKED Stop and go TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th March
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Manhole cover loose and traffic running over it causing excessive noise rattle., 5th March
item.description:
A46 between pedestrian crossover and Toby Carvery entrance

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shurdington Road, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes across dual carriage way again !!!!, 5th March
item.description:
I'm sick to death of reporting this stretch of the A40. Deep potholes on both lanes of the dual carriageway again !! Appalling pointless repairs keep being carried out - just do it properly with some care and diligence !!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shipton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th March
item.description:
Cway pothole 1800mm x 300mm x 62mm UNMARKED Stop and go TM required (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 5th March
item.description:
pothole
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole near Howdens, 5th March
item.description:
Kingsville Road near Howdens

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): .., Kingsditch, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree Root damaged pavement - overturned my pram, 5th March
item.description:
The tree has damaged the pavement creating a raised mound that has a broken surface on top and a hole. My pram wheel got caught in the hole this morning, completely overturning the pram with my 2 year old daughter inside. She hit her head, luckily not badly. I sustained a sprained ankle, bruised shin and hurt my right arm trying to catch the pram.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Charlton Park Drive, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Other damage to pavement i.e. cobbles, raised mound/surface

item.title: Blocking visibility on road/junction (Grass/verge) problem, 5th March
item.description:
Trench in verge that is dangerous to pedestrians.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles problem, 5th March
item.description:
Potential unauthorised development on the highway. Nothing on causeway. They are obstructing the pavement and they have actually been seen by the customer pushing an old lady off the pavement to around the works taking place. There is a load of rubbish across the area and they have no care in the situation. Seems like some sort of development works.
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Light sensor is not detecting vehicles

item.title: Huge potholes coming down the hill into Sevenhampton and huge ones either side of the stream, 5th March
item.description:
As you turn into Sevenhampton coming down the hill there’s huge potholes and also before and after the stream there are massive potholes. The road by the stream could do with concreting so potholes don’t keep returning from water residue left from cars coming through.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sevenhampton, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard shell is damaged/vandalised problem, 5th March
item.description:
Damaged Illuminated KL Bollard. Please pass on to Street Lighting to arrange reinstatement
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 5th March
item.description:
Damaged Illuminated KL Bollard CW ENWD Road closure TM At traffic lights MAKE SAFE ONLY WITH TEMPORARY KL SIGN Enquiry raised for Street Lighting to reinstall (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Willow tree in hedge has split and is leaning on an oak beside it, and is overhanging the lane., 5th March
item.description:
Sandy Pluck Lane, in the verge opposite The Daffodils which is the first house down the lane. This willow has been split fir several months and is at risk of falling across the highway.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sandy Pluck Lane, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple dangerous potholes on Warden Hill Road near junction with Bournside Close, 5th March
item.description:
Multiple dangerous potholes on Warden Hill Road near junction with Bournside Close Nearby resident states that these potholes cause his house to shudder when large/heavy vehicles hit them.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Bournside Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 5th March

item.description:

item.title: Flytipping, 5th March
item.description:
Three items fly tipped on Cassin Drive - I don't know the house number but its opposite the access road for the community centre and police station.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3a-3h, Cassin Drive, Golden Valley, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Furniture flytipped, 5th March
item.description:
There is a pile of furniture fly tipped by the wall on CBC land

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Princess Elizabeth Way, Benhall, Cheltenham
